name: microservices-backend
description: Microservices backend with Node.js, Express, Mongoose and TypeScript

scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev:user" "npm run dev:product" "npm run dev:order" "npm run dev:gateway"
scripts.build:all: concurrently "cd user-service && npm run build" "cd product-service && npm run build" "cd order-service && npm run build" "cd api-gateway && npm run build"
scripts.start:all: concurrently "cd user-service && npm start" "cd product-service && npm start" "cd order-service && npm start" "cd api-gateway && npm start"

author: MD.Anis Molla
